form.label: Risk Overview
form.description: Version 2.8: Optimized with base queries for all data domains (HW_EOX, SW_EOX, SW_DEFERRAL, PSIRT, FN, CONFORMANCE, BP, DEVICE, CHASSIS).

search.query: `cisco_oi_index("$cpyKey$")` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroup | mvexpand groupName | dedup groupName | table groupName | sort groupName

condition.set: [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]
search [| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId WHERE ( `cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:devicegroupmember groupName="$groupIdSelected$")]

search.query: | makeresults | eval groupName="$groupIdSelected$" | table groupName

| makeresults | eval hwEoxStrategy = if(like($hwEoxFilter$,"ldos"), "currentEndOfLifeMilestone=*LDoS*", "currentEndOfLifeMilestone=*LDoS* OR currentEndOfLifeMilestone=*EoVSS* OR currentEndOfLifeMilestone=*EoSCR*") | table hwEoxStrategy

| makeresults | eval swEoxStrategy = case($swEoxFilter$="LDoS", " (currentEndOfLifeMilestone=LDoS)", $swEoxFilter$="EoVSS", " (currentEndOfLifeMilestone=LDoS OR currentEndOfLifeMilestone=EoVSS)", $swEoxFilter$="EoSWM", "(currentEndOfLifeMilestone=LDoS OR currentEndOfLifeMilestone=EoVSS OR currentEndOfLifeMilestone=EoSWM)") | table swEoxStrategy

| makeresults | eval psirtStrategy = case(like($psirtFilter$, "workarounds"), "| eval psirtVulnDevice = if(psirtColdId=679 OR psirtColdId=906 OR psirtColdId=1071 OR psirtColdId=1219 OR psirtColdId=1429 OR psirtColdId=1648 OR psirtColdId=1497 OR psirtColdId=598 OR psirtColdId=646 OR psirtColdId=912 OR psirtColdId=913 OR psirtColdId=328, 1, 0)", like($psirtFilter$,"critical"), "| eval psirtVulnDevice = if(securityImpactRating=\"Critical\", 1, 0)", like($psirtFilter$,"criticalHigh"), "| eval psirtVulnDevice = if(securityImpactRating=\"Critical\" OR securityImpactRating=\"High\", 1, 0)", 1=1, "| eval psirtVulnDevice = if(securityImpactRating=\"Critical\" OR securityImpactRating=\"High\" OR securityImpactRating=\"Medium\" OR securityImpactRating=\"Low\", 1, 0)") | table psirtStrategy
| makeresults | eval fnStrategy = if(like($fnFilter$,"all"), "matchConfidence=Vulnerable", "matchConfidence=Vulnerable (bulletinTitle=*cpu* OR bulletinTitle=*memory*)") | table fnStrategy

| makeresults | eval bpStrategy=if(like($bpFilter$,"Top3"),"| eval HighBPDevice = if(bpRuleId=\"7710\" OR bpRuleId=\"7348\" OR bpRuleId=\"8315\", 1, 0)", if(like($bpFilter$,"HighMed"),"| eval HighBPDevice = if(bpRisk=\"High\" OR bpRisk=\"Medium\", 1, 0)", "| eval HighBPDevice = if(bpRisk=\"High\", 1, 0)")) | eval bpStrategy = bpStrategy . " | search HighBPDevice=1" | table bpStrategy

| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId, values(currentEndOfLifeMilestone) as currentEndOfLifeMilestone, values(currentEndOfLifeMilestoneDate) as currentEndOfLifeMilestoneDate, values(deviceName) as deviceName, values(hardwareEndOfLifeId) as hardwareEndOfLifeId, values(nextEndOfLifeMilestone) as nextEndOfLifeMilestone, values(nextEndOfLifeMilestoneDate) as nextEndOfLifeMilestoneDate, values(physicalAssetType) as physicalAssetType, values(productId) as productId WHERE (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:hardwareendoflife) by physicalAssetId, _time | fillnull value="NA" currentEndOfLifeMilestone | fillnull value="NA" currentEndOfLifeMilestoneDate | fillnull value="NA" nextEndOfLifeMilestone | fillnull value="NA" nextEndOfLifeMilestoneDate | fillnull value="NA" hardwareEndOfLifeId | search physicalAssetType=Chassis AND ($kvHwEoxStrategy$)

| tstats values(currentEndOfLifeMilestone) as currentEndOfLifeMilestone, values(currentEndOfLifeMilestoneDate) as currentEndOfLifeMilestoneDate, values(deviceName) as deviceName, values(softwareEndOfLifeId) as softwareEndOfLifeId, values(nextEndOfLifeMilestone) as nextEndOfLifeMilestone, values(nextEndOfLifeMilestoneDate) as nextEndOfLifeMilestoneDate, values(productId) as productId, values(productFamily) as productFamily, values(productType) as productType, values(softwareVersion) as softwareVersion WHERE ((`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:softwareendoflife) OR (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:device)) deviceId IN (*) by deviceId, _time | fillnull value="NA" currentEndOfLifeMilestone | fillnull value="NA" currentEndOfLifeMilestoneDate | fillnull value="NA" nextEndOfLifeMilestone | fillnull value="NA" nextEndOfLifeMilestoneDate | search ($kvSwEoxStrategy$)

| tstats values(deviceName) as deviceName, values(productId) as productId, values(productFamily) as productFamily, values(productType) as productType, values(softwareVersion) as softwareVersion, values(softwareType) as softwareType, values(softwareAlertUrl) as softwareAlertUrl, values(imageName) as imageName WHERE ((`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:softwareadvisoryalert softwareAlertType=DF) OR (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:device)) deviceId IN (*) by deviceId, _time

(`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:securityadvisory) OR (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:securityadvisorybulletin) | stats values(deviceId) as deviceId, values(matchConfidence) as matchConfidence, values(matchConfidenceReason) as matchConfidenceReason, values(securityImpactRating) as securityImpactRating, values(bulletinUrl) as bulletinUrl by securityAdvisoryColdId | mvexpand deviceId | search matchConfidence=Vulnerable $kvPsirtStrategy$ | search psirtVulnDevice=1

(`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:fieldnotice) OR (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:fieldnoticebulletin) | stats values(deviceId) as deviceId, values(matchConfidence) as matchConfidence, values(bulletinTitle) as bulletinTitle, values(bulletinUrl) as bulletinUrl by fieldNoticeId | mvexpand deviceId | search $kvFnStrategy$

| tstats latest(isSoftwareTrackCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackCompliant, latest(isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant, latest(isSoftwareTrackPreviousCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackPreviousCompliant, latest(softwareTrackId) as softwareTrackId, latest(softwareTrackName) as softwareTrackName WHERE (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:softwaretrackmember) by deviceId, _time

| tstats values(deviceId) as deviceId, values(totalDevices) as totalDevices, values(bestPracticeRisk) as bpRisk, values(bestPracticePrimaryTechnology) as bestPracticePrimaryTechnology, values(bestPracticeTitle) as bestPracticeTitle, values(softwareType) as softwareType, values(bestPracticeNuggetId) as bestPracticeNuggetId WHERE ((`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:configbestpracticesummary) OR (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:configbestpracticedetail)) bestPracticeRuleId IN (*) by bestPracticeRuleId, _time | mvexpand deviceId $kvBpStrategy$

| tstats latest(deviceName) as deviceName, latest(productId) as productId, latest(productFamily) as productFamily, latest(productType) as productType, latest(softwareVersion) as softwareVersion, latest(softwareType) as softwareType, latest(inventoryStatus) as inventoryStatus, latest(inventoryTimestamp) as inventoryTimestamp, latest(configStatus) as configStatus, latest(configTimestamp) as configTimestamp, latest(deviceStatus) as deviceStatus WHERE (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:device) by deviceId, _time

| tstats latest(deviceId) as deviceId, latest(physicalAssetType) as physicalAssetType, latest(productId) as productId WHERE (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype=cisco:bcs:asset physicalAssetType=Chassis) by physicalAssetId, _time
| stats count as Initialize | eval title="KPIs by Category and Risk Source" | table title
| stats count as Initialize | eval title="Lifecycle Risk" | table title
| loadjob $HW_EOX$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(physicalAssetId) as count by _time | table count, _time

| loadjob $HW_EOX$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(physicalAssetId) as count by _time | eval hwLdosPerc = (100*count/$kvChassisCount$) | table hwLdosPerc, _time | appendpipe [| stats count as hwLdosPerc | where hwLdosPerc=0 ]
| loadjob $SW_EOX$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as count by _time | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]

| loadjob $SW_EOX$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as count by _time | eval swEoxPerc = (100*count/$kvManagedElements$) | table swEoxPerc, _time | appendpipe [| stats count as swEoxPerc | where swEoxPerc=0 ]
| loadjob $SW_DEFERRAL$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as count by _time | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]

| loadjob $SW_DEFERRAL$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as count by _time | eval dfPerc = (100*count/$kvManagedElements$) | table dfPerc, _time | appendpipe [| stats count as dfPerc | where dfPerc=0 ]

table.title: HW Eox Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $HW_EOX$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showHwEoxDetails$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | lookup `cisco_oi_hw_bulletin_lookup($cpyKey$)` productId OUTPUT bulletinNumber, bulletinTitle, bulletinUrl, endOfLifeAnnouncementDate, endOfNewServiceAttachmentDate, endOfRoutineFailureAnalysisDate, endOfSaleDate, endOfServiceContractRenewalDate, endOfSoftwareMaintenanceReleasesDate, endOfVulnerabilitySecuritySupportDate, lastDayOfSupportDate, lastShipDate | fields deviceName, deviceId, physicalAssetId, physicalAssetType, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion, hardwareEndOfLifeId, currentEndOfLifeMilestone, currentEndOfLifeMilestoneDate, nextEndOfLifeMilestone, nextEndOfLifeMilestoneDate, bulletinNumber, bulletinTitle, bulletinUrl, endOfLifeAnnouncementDate, endOfNewServiceAttachmentDate, endOfRoutineFailureAnalysisDate, endOfSaleDate, endOfServiceContractRenewalDate, endOfSoftwareMaintenanceReleasesDate, endOfVulnerabilitySecuritySupportDate, lastDayOfSupportDate, lastShipDate | stats latest(*) as * by physicalAssetId | lookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` deviceId OUTPUT productFamily, productType, softwareVersion | table deviceId, deviceName, physicalAssetId, physicalAssetType, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion, currentEndOfLifeMilestone, currentEndOfLifeMilestoneDate, nextEndOfLifeMilestone, nextEndOfLifeMilestoneDate, endOfLifeAnnouncementDate, endOfSaleDate, lastShipDate, endOfSoftwareMaintenanceReleasesDate, endOfRoutineFailureAnalysisDate, endOfNewServiceAttachmentDate, endOfVulnerabilitySecuritySupportDate, endOfServiceContractRenewalDate, lastDayOfSupportDate

table.title: SW Eox Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $SW_EOX$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showSwEoxDetails$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | dedup deviceId | table deviceName, deviceId, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion, softwareEndOfLifeId, currentEndOfLifeMilestone, currentEndOfLifeMilestoneDate, nextEndOfLifeMilestone, nextEndOfLifeMilestoneDate | lookup `cisco_oi_sw_bulletin_lookup($cpyKey$)` softwareEndOfLifeId OUTPUT bulletinNumber, bulletinTitle, bulletinUrl, endOfLifeAnnouncementDate, endOfSaleDate, endOfSoftwareMaintenanceReleasesDate, endOfVulnerabilitySecuritySupportDate, lastDayOfSupportDate

table.title: SW Deferral Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $SW_DEFERRAL$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showSwDeferralDetails$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | table deviceName, deviceId, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion, softwareType, softwareAlertUrl, imageName
| stats count as Initialize | eval title="Vulnerability Risk" | table title
| loadjob $PSIRT$ | search $groupSelector$ | stats dc(securityAdvisoryColdId) as vulnPsirts | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]
| loadjob $PSIRT$ | search $groupSelector$ | dedup deviceId, securityAdvisoryColdId | stats count as vulnExceptions | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]
| loadjob $PSIRT$ | search $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as VulnDevices | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]
| loadjob $PSIRT$ | search $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as VulnDevices | eval psirtPerc = (100*VulnDevices/$kvManagedElements$) | table psirtPerc | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]
| loadjob $FN$ | search $groupSelector$ | stats dc(fieldNoticeId) as vulnFNs | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]
| loadjob $FN$ | search $groupSelector$ | search matchConfidence=Vulnerable | dedup deviceId, fieldNoticeId | stats count as vulnFnExceptions | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]
| loadjob $FN$ | search $groupSelector$ | search matchConfidence=Vulnerable | stats dc(deviceId) as vulnDevices | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]

| loadjob $FN$ | search $groupSelector$ | search matchConfidence=Vulnerable | stats dc(deviceId) as VulnDevices | eval fnPerc = (100*VulnDevices/$kvManagedElements$) | table fnPerc | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]

table.title: PSIRT Exception Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $PSIRT$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showPsirtDetails$ | search $groupSelector$ | dedup deviceId, securityAdvisoryColdId | lookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` deviceId OUTPUT deviceName, softwareVersion, softwareType, productId, productFamily, productType | fields - psirtVulnDevice | table deviceName, deviceId, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion, softwareType, securityAdvisoryColdId, securityImpactRating, matchConfidence, matchConfidenceReason, bulletinUrl

table.title: FN Exception Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $FN$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showFnExceptionDetails$ | search $groupSelector$ | search matchConfidence=Vulnerable | dedup deviceId, fieldNoticeId | lookup local=true `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` deviceId OUTPUT deviceName productId productFamily productType softwareVersion | table deviceName, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion, bulletinTitle, bulletinUrl
| stats count as Initialize | eval title="Compliance Risk" | table title

| loadjob $CONFORMANCE$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search isSoftwareTrackCompliant=true | stats dc(deviceId) as tcDevices by _time | table tcDevices, _time | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]

| loadjob $CONFORMANCE$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search isSoftwareTrackCompliant=true | stats dc(deviceId) as tcDevices by _time | eval tcPerc = (100*tcDevices/$kvTrackedElements$) | table tcPerc, _time | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]

| loadjob $CONFORMANCE$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant=true | stats dc(deviceId) as tcDevices by _time | table tcDevices, _time | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]

| loadjob $CONFORMANCE$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant=true | stats dc(deviceId) as fcDevices by _time | eval fcPerc = (100*fcDevices/$kvTrackedElements$) | table fcPerc, _time | appendpipe [| stats count | where count=0 ]
| loadjob $BP$ | search $groupSelector$ | stats dc(bestPracticeRuleId) as Rules by _time | table Rules, _time
| loadjob $BP$ | search $groupSelector$ | stats count as Exceptions by _time | table Exceptions, _time
| loadjob $BP$ | search $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as Devices by _time | table Devices, _time

| loadjob $BP$ | search $groupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as Devices by _time | eval BPDevicePercent = round(100*Devices/$kvManagedElements$) | table BPDevicePercent, _time | appendpipe [ stats count | where count=0 ]

table.title: Conformance Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $CONFORMANCE$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showConformance$ | append [| tstats latest(softwareTrackDescription) as softwareTrackDescription, latest(softwareTrackLastModifiedDate) as softwareTrackLastModifiedDate, latest(softwareTrackRating) as softwareTrackRating, latest(softwareTrackRecommendationDate) as softwareTrackRecommendationDate, latest(softwareTrackPreviousVersion1) as softwareTrackPreviousVersion1, latest(softwareTrackPreviousVersion2) as softwareTrackPreviousVersion2, latest(softwareTrackStandardVersion) as softwareTrackStandardVersion, latest(softwareTrackStatus) as softwareTrackStatus, latest(softwareTrackUpgradeReason) as softwareTrackUpgradeReason, latest(softwareType) as softwareType WHERE (`cisco_oi_index($cpyKey$)` sourcetype::cisco:bcs:softwaretracksummary) by softwareTrackId] | stats values(isSoftwareTrackCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackCompliant, values(isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant, values(isSoftwareTrackPreviousCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackPreviousCompliant, values(softwareTrackName) as softwareTrackName, values(softwareTrackDescription) as softwareTrackDescription, values(softwareTrackLastModifiedDate) as softwareTrackLastModifiedDate, values(softwareTrackRating) as softwareTrackRating, values(softwareTrackRecommendationDate) as softwareTrackRecommendationDate, values(softwareTrackPreviousVersion1) as softwareTrackPreviousVersion1, values(softwareTrackPreviousVersion2) as softwareTrackPreviousVersion2, values(softwareTrackStandardVersion) as softwareTrackStandardVersion, values(softwareTrackStatus) as softwareTrackStatus, values(softwareTrackUpgradeReason) as softwareTrackUpgradeReason, values(softwareType) as softwareType, values(deviceId) as deviceId by softwareTrackId | mvexpand deviceId | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | lookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` deviceId OUTPUT deviceName, featureSetDescription, imageName, lastResetTimestamp, productFamily, productId, productType, softwareVersion, resetReason, snmpSysDescription, snmpSysLocation | table deviceId, deviceName, softwareTrackId, softwareTrackName, softwareTrackDescription, softwareVersion, softwareType, softwareTrackStandardVersion, softwareTrackPreviousVersion1, softwareTrackPreviousVersion2, productId, productFamily, productType *

table.title: BP Exceptions Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $BP$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showBpDetails$ | search $groupSelector$ | search deviceId!="" | lookup local=true `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` deviceId OUTPUT deviceName productId productFamily productType softwareVersion | rex field=bestPracticePrimaryTechnology mode=sed "s/\*//" | table deviceName, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion, bestPracticeRuleId, bestPracticeTitle, bpRisk, bestPracticePrimaryTechnology
| stats count as Initialize | eval title="Data Collection" | table title

single.title: In at least one SW track

search.query: | loadjob $CONFORMANCE$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as TrackedElements
| loadjob $DEVICE$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(deviceId) as ManagedElements
| loadjob $CHASSIS$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | stats dc(physicalAssetId) as NumChassis

| loadjob $DEVICE$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search inventoryStatus=Completed | stats dc(deviceId) as Inventories by _time | eval invPerc = (100*Inventories/$kvManagedElements$) | table invPerc, _time
| loadjob $DEVICE$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | search configStatus=Completed | stats dc(deviceId) as Configs by _time | eval confPerc = (100*Configs/$kvManagedElements$) | table confPerc, _time

table.title: Tracked Elements Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $CONFORMANCE$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showTrackedDetails$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | lookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` deviceId OUTPUT deviceName, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion | stats values(softwareTrackName) as Tracks, latest(isSoftwareTrackCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackCompliant, latest(isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant) as isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant by deviceId, deviceName, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion | table deviceId, deviceName, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion, Tracks, isSoftwareTrackCompliant, isSoftwareTrackFlexibleCompliant

table.title: Managed Elements Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $DEVICE$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showManagedElementDetails$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | dedup deviceId | table deviceId, deviceName, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion, softwareType, inventoryStatus, configStatus

table.title: Chassis Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $CHASSIS$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showChassisDetails$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | lookup `cisco_oi_device_lookup($cpyKey$)` deviceId OUTPUT deviceName, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion | table deviceId, deviceName, physicalAssetId, physicalAssetType, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion

table.title: Data Capture Drilldown. To dismiss this drilldown, click anywhere in the table below the header.

search.query: | loadjob $DEVICE$ | eval pauseUntilDrilldown = $showDataCaptureDetails$ | $singleLineGroupSelector$ | dedup deviceId | table deviceId, deviceName, productId, productFamily, productType, softwareVersion, inventoryStatus, inventoryTimestamp, configStatus, configTimestamp
